general_tools.name: check_availability
general_tools.description: Get real open time slots for the 15-minute setup call from the live calendar. Call this before offering any times.

general_tools.name: book_setup_call
general_tools.description: Book the 15-minute setup call on the live calendar. Only call after the caller picked a specific slot from check_availability and gave their name and email.

slot_start.description: The exact slot_start ISO timestamp of the slot the caller picked, copied verbatim from the check_availability result.

phone.description: Caller's mobile number; use the number they are calling from if not stated

email.description: Caller's email address for the calendar invite

general_tools.name: end_call
general_tools.description: End the SMS conversation after a final wrap-up message.
